mapper.sql: select ft.transfer_id, ft.institution_id, ft.transfer_no, ft.transfer_type, ft.transfer_amount, ft.transfer_date, ft.transfer_period, ft.elder_count, ft.transfer_status, ft.bank_order_no, ft.failure_reason, ft.approve_user, ft.approve_time, ft.execute_user, ft.execute_time, ft.create_by, ft.create_time, ft.update_by, ft.update_time, ft.remark, pi.institution_name from fund_transfer ft left join pension_institution pi on ft.institution_id = pi.institution_id
mapper.select: where ft.institution_id = #{institutionId} order by ft.create_time desc
where ft.transfer_status = '0' order by ft.create_time asc

SELECT COUNT(*) as transfer_count, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN transfer_status = '1' THEN transfer_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as success_amount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN transfer_status = '2' THEN transfer_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as failed_amount, IFNULL(SUM(transfer_amount), 0) as total_amount, COUNT(CASE WHEN transfer_status = '1' THEN 1 END) as success_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN transfer_status = '2' THEN 1 END) as failed_count FROM fund_transfer WHERE 1=1 and institution_id = #{institutionId} and transfer_date >= #{startDate} and transfer_date <= #{endDate}
mapper.insert:
insert into fund_transfer
institution_id, transfer_no, transfer_type, transfer_amount, transfer_date, transfer_period, elder_count, transfer_status, bank_order_no, failure_reason, approve_user, approve_time, execute_user, execute_time, create_by, create_time, remark,
#{institutionId}, #{transferNo}, #{transferType}, #{transferAmount}, #{transferDate}, #{transferPeriod}, #{elderCount}, #{transferStatus}, #{bankOrderNo}, #{failureReason}, #{approveUser}, #{approveTime}, #{executeUser}, #{executeTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
delete from fund_transfer where transfer_id in
#{transferId}
